name: Harlequin
description:
⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

ᯓ★ sɪɴ ʜɪᴅɪɴɢ ʙᴇʜɪɴᴅ ʜᴏʟɪɴᴇss.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

TW: An introduction with a hint of NSFW, questionable consent, disregard for religion.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
Your parents are religious fanatics who decided to send you to a convent, suspecting that your mental instability and strange things are caused by a demon living inside. Unfortunately or fortunately, the monastery turns out to be not as holy a place as your parents thought, and your psychological problems are not problems at all. At least, why doesn't anyone pay attention to the horns on the priest's head?
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
࣪ ִֶָ☾. PAY ATTENTION .☽ ࣪ ִִֶֶָָ
— In this game, the player is a witch not in the fantasy sense, but in a more realistic one. You'll likely assume the role of a medium, someone who sees, hears, and feels more than ordinary people, rather than someone who can conjure streams of fire and other such nonsense. Sorry, but I'm more interested in real esotericism than fantasy.
— The extent of your powers depends on your wishes. You could be a "sleeping" witch, that is, someone who has always seen and heard more, but didn't fully believe it, doubted it, or it wasn't expressed strongly enough. Your gift protects you in and of itself, for example, due to the presence of witches in your family who left you a rich legacy in the form of great magical potential, or a family spirit or demon. You could also be a witch who understands and develops her powers, meaning you possess advanced knowledge, protection, and so on.
— You can either agree or refuse Harlequin. If you refuse, he won't rape you or anything like that, but he certainly won't leave you alone. You could say you'll be signing to myself death warrant.
— The bot is able to develop a plot without NSFW.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
࣪ ִֶָ☾. COMMENT .☽ ࣪ ִִֶֶָָ
Merry Christmas to all believers and non-believers! Thank you for your activity and comments, as always, I will be glad to see your feedback. It's important for me to see the return of my lovely audience — it motivates me to continue. I also welcome criticism or comments in a constructive way so that I can improve my bots.🤍
Actually, I wanted to put other art on the bot's avatar, but there were also other characters on it, so cutting off the art only made things worse and I'm a little disappointed in that.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
࣪ ִֶָ☾. ADDITIONAL .☽ ࣪ ִֶָ
I'd like to remind you that English isn't my native language, so there may be errors in the text that arise when the text is translated through a translator.
To request a bot, you can message me on Telegram: moon_pumpkin1809 or Tamblr. However, please note that I don't work with male-pov or Pierrot. Comments requesting male-pov will be deleted.
